title: Integrate failure-domain capacity into coordination
goal: Extend Bureau claims and Grabowski non-conflict evidence with critical failure-domain capacity and shared recovery-path conflicts.

approval.note: User explicitly authorized full registration and implementation on 2026-07-18; live-state, claims, diff review, CI, merge and runtime evidence remain mandatory.

acceptance.assertion: Failure domains are typed resources or validated metadata, not free-form scheduling labels.
Critical domains can declare capacity and exclusivity without reintroducing a global one-ball lock.
Disjoint file work is denied when both changes endanger the same critical domain or recovery path.
Independent changes remain parallelizable with complete, hash-bound scope evidence.

does_not_establish: authority outside the listed source systems
